HGSS.255.0000:
I see.\f
So you are playing hide-and-seek
wih my granddaughter.\f
I guess there is no need to worry
as long as she’s on the ship!
HGSS.255.0001:
Oh, hello...\f
My granddaughter is still missing.
If she’s on the ship, that’s OK.\f
She’s an energetic child, so she may be
bothering someone. That worries me...
HGSS.255.0002:
Grandpa, here I am!\f
I was playing hide-and-seek
with this guy!\f
HGSS.255.0003:
Grandpa, here I am!\f
I was playing hide-and-seek
with this girl!\f
HGSS.255.0004:
[0103,0000,0000], was it?
I heard you entertained my\r
granddaughter.\f
I want to thank you for that.
Take this.\f
HGSS.255.0005:
[0103,0000,0000], was it?
I heard you entertained my\r
granddaughter.\f
I want to thank you for that.
Take this.\f
HGSS.255.0006:
Fast Ship S.S. Aqua
has arrived in Vermilion City.
